name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V9.3 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 56 skills, 35 agents, 42 MCP tools, 33 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V9.3 hardens the safety and integrity surface: every PreToolUse and Stop hook is structurally fail-open (a malformed payload can never brick a tool call); a catalog-count drift guard asserts every count site against the files on disk; and the install guide renders from one template so it cannot go stale — building on V9.2's single-VERSION release-integrity pass.
compatibility_notes: V9.3.0 preserves the native Codex manifest. Installer does not copy the Claude manifest over Codex metadata. This file is the one hand-maintained version site; render-manifest-template.py --check asserts its version equals the VERSION file.
Hooks may require feature detection depending on Codex runtime version.
Subagents supported via Task tool; agent definitions shared with Claude runtime.
Cognitive memory, dreams, learning, and pathfinding are local-first and governed by release gates.
